# واعي — Waaei

> Free, anonymous Arabic-language mental health self-assessment tests based on validated clinical scales. No registration. No data stored.

Waaei is an Arabic mental health platform offering 24 free anonymous self-assessment tests based on internationally validated clinical scales (PHQ-9, GAD-7, ASRS-5, ISI, and more). Designed for Arabic speakers in the GCC and Egypt. All results stay in your browser — nothing is stored on any server.

## Self-Assessment Tests

- Depression (PHQ-9): https://waaei.me/اختبار-الاكتئاب
- Anxiety (GAD-7): https://waaei.me/اختبار-القلق
- ADHD (ASRS-5): https://waaei.me/اختبار-ADHD-للبالغين
- Insomnia (ISI): https://waaei.me/اختبار-الأرق
- Phone addiction (SAS-SV): https://waaei.me/اختبار-إدمان-الهاتف
- Stress (PSS-10): https://waaei.me/اختبار-التوتر
- Burnout: https://waaei.me/اختبار-الإحتراق-الوظيفي
- OCD (OCI-R): https://waaei.me/اختبار-الوسواس-القهري
- PTSD (PCL-5): https://waaei.me/اختبار-الصدمة-النفسية
- Social phobia (SPIN): https://waaei.me/اختبار-الرهاب-الاجتماعي
- Self-esteem (RSES): https://waaei.me/اختبار-تقدير-الذات
- Emotional intelligence (BEIS-10): https://waaei.me/اختبار-الذكاء-العاطفي
- Loneliness (ULS-8): https://waaei.me/اختبار-الوحدة-النفسية
- Anger (STAXI): https://waaei.me/اختبار-الغضب
- Sleep quality (PSQI): https://waaei.me/اختبار-جودة-النوم
- Bipolar screening (MDQ): https://waaei.me/اختبار-ثنائي-القطب
- Eating disorders (EAT-7): https://waaei.me/اختبار-اضطراب-الأكل
- Narcissism (PNI-16): https://waaei.me/اختبار-الشخصية-النرجسية
- Attachment style (ECR-S): https://waaei.me/اختبار-نمط-التعلق-العاطفي
- Big Five personality (BFI-10): https://waaei.me/اختبار-الشخصية-الخمسة
- Depression + anxiety + stress (DASS-21): https://waaei.me/اختبار-الاكتئاب-والقلق-والتوتر
- Post-traumatic growth (PTGI-SF): https://waaei.me/اختبار-النمو-بعد-الصدمة
- Substance use (AUDIT-C): https://waaei.me/اختبار-أنماط-الاستهلاك
- Postpartum depression (EPDS): https://waaei.me/اختبار-اكتئاب-ما-بعد-الولادة
- All tests: https://waaei.me/اختبارات

## Articles

Arabic mental health educational articles: https://waaei.me/مقالات

## About

Operated by Emdash (UAE, DED Abu Dhabi). Privacy-first — no accounts, no data collection, no tracking beyond anonymous analytics.
Contact: contact@emdash.ae
